suggestion: The topic is strong as-is. To push novelty higher, emphasize the self-selected threshold game formalism as a new game class rather than framing it as an analysis of a TV show game. Lead with the theoretical contribution — sequential elimination under endogenous difficulty ordering with stochastic cognitive performance — and use Fragments of Memory as a motivating example rather than the title. This reframing broadens appeal (contest design, adaptive testing, AI agent evaluation) and avoids reviewers dismissing it as a case study. Consider adding a mechanism design result (optimal question-pool composition for a designer) to strengthen the 'so what' for the EC/AAMAS audience.
